title: Moue Milkshakes
description: Grimace Shakes are/were the big thing. So I thought "Why the hell not". Using state-of-the-art methods, you can mix wacky ingredients to make some shakes!
body:
### Moue (/mu/) #### a little grimace : pout ## Why, just why?? Grimace Shakes are/were the big thing. So I thought "Why the hell not." Now I can proudly present Moue Milkshakes! Using state-of-the-art methods, you can produce shakes using milk, shake mix, and a flavor additive! Theres a plethora to choose from and make, so get started today!
Between Chocolate, Vanilla, and Strawberry shakes for everyday consumption or the special shakes for pranking your friends, you'll never need another milkshake mod! We claim no responsibility to damage to property or self when drinking these shakes... --- This mod was originally made for `BlanketCon 23: cyber/NOVA`!
